title: ecbolium protractum
intro: Ecbolium protractum, also known as the forest mint or mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Ecbolium protractum has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium protractum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. Ecbolium protractum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although its preparation methods can vary depending on the intended application.
